docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, ARJIS , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 22 BUCARELI DRIVE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76614034)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76614034), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAY-27-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ARJIS , AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76614034), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAY-28-2025, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76673349)
DECLARATION OF DAVID P WASSERMAN IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION AND DAILY VALUE (TRANSACTION ID # 76673349) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76679394)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ARJIS , AN INDIVIDUAL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ARJIS , AN INDIVIDUAL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ARJIS , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ARJIS , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 76560768) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ARJIS , AN INDIVIDUAL
